html:
Exclusive to:

Flat Stone Turf is a Turf Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It can be found in the Pig City Biome. Flat Stone Turf can be crafted using one Cut Stone in the City Planning Tab if the player is holding a Key to the City.

When placed on the Surface World covering a large enough area, Pigeons and Crows are the only Birds that will spawn and land on these turfs. This turf prevents BFB from landing.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, this Turf will not spawn Puddles. Tides and expanding Puddles can still flood this turf, however.

Gallery

  • Flat Stone Turf texture.
  • Flat Stone Turf as seen in a promotional screenshot.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Flat Stone Turf is a Turf Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It can be found in the Pig City Biome. Flat Stone Turf can be crafted using one Cut Stone in the City Planning Tab if the player is holding a Key to the City.
When placed on the Surface World covering a large enough area, Pigeons and Crows are the only Birds that will spawn and land on these turfs. This turf prevents BFB from landing.
In the Shipwrecked DLC, this Turf will not spawn Puddles. Tides and expanding Puddles can still flood this turf, however.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đất Đá Phẳng là Vật Phẩm Đất độc quyền trong Hamlet DLC. Nó có thể được tìm thấy trong Quần xã Thành phố Lợn. Đất Đá Phẳng có thể được chế tạo bằng cách sử dụng một Đá Cắt trong Thẻ Quy hoạch Thành phố nếu người chơi đang giữ Chìa khóa Thành phố.

'''Flat Stone Turf''' is a [[Turfs|Turf]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It can be found in the [[Pig City]] [[Biomes|Biome]]. Flat Stone Turf can be crafted using one [[Cut Stone]] in the [[City Planning Tab]] if the player is holding a [[Key to the City]].

When placed on the [[Surface World]] covering a large enough area, [[Pigeon]]s and [[Crow]]s are the only Birds that will spawn and land on these turfs. This turf prevents [[BFB]] from landing.

In the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, this Turf will not spawn [[Flooding|Puddles]]. Tides and expanding Puddles can still flood this turf, however.
